# CTFontCopyVariationAxes(_:)

**Function**

Returns an array of variation axes.

## Declaration

```swift
func CTFontCopyVariationAxes(_ font: CTFont) -> CFArray?
```

## Parameters

- **font**: The font reference.

## Return Value

An array of variation axes dictionaries. Each variation axis dictionary contains the five variation axis keys listed in [doc://com.apple.coretext/documentation/CoreText/font-variation-axis-dictionary-keys].

## Working With Font Variations

- **CTFontCopyVariation(_:)**: Returns a variation dictionary from the font reference.
